description: Fix 4 test timeouts from live API calls
task:
Fix 4 test failures that are all subprocess timeouts from live API calls.

1. In tests/cli/test_pack_commands.py, add @pytest.mark.skip with reason 'Requires Anthropic API key and Wikipedia network access' to: test_create_basic around line 111, test_create_missing_output_dir around line 153, test_create_install_list_remove_workflow around line 463.

2. In tests/cli/test_query_pack_name_validation.py, test_valid_hyphenated_name_not_blocked around line 107: change the pack name from 'go-expert' to 'nonexistent-pack-abc123' so it hits the 'not found' exit path quickly instead of loading a real pack and calling Claude API.

After fixes, run: uv run pytest tests/ --timeout=60 --no-cov -q to verify 0 failures.
